name: Cline v. Oklahoma Coalition for Reproductive Justice
question: Did the Oklahoma Supreme Court err in holding that the state law restricting the administration of abortion-inducing drugs to the uses described on their FDA labels conflicts with Supreme Court rulings that protect a woman's constitutional right to seek an abortion?
description: A case which the Court dismissed concerning whether or not the Oklahoma legislature violated a woman's rights to an abortion by restricting the uses of abortion-inducing drugs to those listed on their FDA labels.
